task.objective: Post-bootstrap milestone 2: Leaf Mesh, Frond and material/cutout vertical slices. Material model v1.1 (base_color, two_sided, cutout outline) with the project's first additive schema evolution (ADR-0004), ear-clipping polygon triangulation, cutout-shaped leaves in both leaf generators, canopy.leaf_mesh emitting per-leaf semantic nodes, canopy.frond ribbon generator (width profile, V-fold, twist, serration), and MTL Kd export carrying material colors end to end.

outputs: src/geometry: polygon.cpp ear-clipping triangulation; sweep_ribbon for fronds
src/document: Material base_color/two_sided/cutout, schema 1.1.0 with 1.x acceptance
src/evaluation: LeafShape cutout support, build_leaves (batched + per-leaf), frond path in the limb builder
src/export: MTL Kd/d from material base_color
samples: IslandPalm document; oak/willow cutout outlines and material colors
tests: triangulation convex/concave/degenerate, ribbon topology, material round-trip, 1.x version acceptance, leaf_mesh distinct nodes, cutout leaf counts, frond determinism

validation.result: 100% tests passed (12 suites) on both presets

CoastalOak 466/104,417 (64653563f900658a); AlpineFir 961/164,070 (8a2f4a8f86bc96a1); WeepingWillow 134/65,669 (5973d28a3c146dbd); IslandPalm 20/9,976 (af4f015501087830); zero warnings; 1.0.0 MinimalTrunk fixture still loads

risks: Ear clipping handles simple polygons only; robust self-intersection detection is heuristic (guard-counter based)
Fronds are single ribbons; multi-strip palm leaflet layouts and blade mesh sections are later work
Leaf Mesh nodes are not yet individually editable (edit layers pending); they only carry distinct semantic IDs
